title: Oompa Loompa In Minecraft
description:
Oompa Loompa doompety doo, I've got the perfect pack for you.
Oompa Loompa doompety dee, if you are wise you'll play with it.
body:
# Oompa Loompa in Minecraft
The hard worker and cocoa bean lover in Minecraft.

## Features
- Oompa Loompa mob with animations, natural spawning and more.
- Chocolate Bars that give the player sugar rushes
- Music to alert players of naturally spawned Oompa Loompas
- Custom drops

## How Was It Made?
The initial inspiration for this datapack came from the Wonka movie which made me want to make it. I had to learn how to use Animated Java to get it to work properly and it took some time but it finally worked in which I was able to finish the whole project.
